title: JointPivotMappingOutput
description: Mapped 5 DOF joint angles to robot pivot names in radians for 3D scene animation.

waist_pivot.description: J1 output mapped to waist_pivot in radians.

shoulder_pivot.description: J2 output mapped to shoulder_pivot in radians.

elbow_pivot.description: J3 output mapped to elbow_pivot in radians.

wrist_roll_pivot.description: J4 output mapped to wrist_roll_pivot in radians.

wrist_pivot.description: J5 output mapped to wrist_pivot in radians.
